body.title: Aider control-arm: 4/4 GREEN — harness gap total, multi-file orientation held, qwen 2.2x faster. Aider is a viable swarm builder.
body.text:
# Aider builder proven viable on our stack (2026-07-06)

aider (external dep, isolated ~/.aider-venv, subprocess-only, v0.86.3.dev) headless vs Hex ollama ($0), isolated sandboxes (own git, no UU remote). Runner: devlab/claudecode/aider_smoke.py (re-runnable, --task {ttl|checkout} --model X).

## Full matrix — 4/4 GREEN
| task | devstral-small-2:24b | qwen3-coder:30b |
|---|---|---|
| ttl (1-file: implement TTLCache) | GREEN 4/4, 35.6s | GREEN 4/4, 16.6s |
| checkout (MULTI-file, NO files pre-added: coordinated edit across shop/models.py + shop/service.py reading shop/pricing.py, found via repo map) | GREEN 5/5, 38.8s | GREEN 5/5, 17.0s |
| DS loop baseline (07-04, devstral) | 0 edits (budget-exhaustion, ~34min HALT) | (not run) |

## Proven (2 confounds resolved, decisively)
1. HARNESS GAP is real and TOTAL. Same model (devstral-24b), same Hex inference, same task shapes DS produced 0 edits on -> aider GREEN on both single- AND multi-file. The multi-file checkout is the exact orientation failure mode DS died on (read-wandering across modules): aider found the files via its repo map with NOTHING pre-added and made the coordinated 2-file edit. The wall was always the LOOP, not the model.
2. MODEL LEVER priced. qwen3-coder:30b (MoE ~3B active) is 2.1-2.3x FASTER than dense devstral-24b AND equally correct. qwen is the builder model; devstral works too (swarm redundancy).

## Verdict
Aider IS a builder we can be happy with on controlled tasks — makes weak local models edit + orient, fast, $0. Fastest path to a swarm builder = aider + qwen3-coder wrapped as a device. Validates Akien's ordering: aider first (known quantity), then level DS to MATCH aider's loop.

## Honest remaining unknown
All tasks are hand-built sandboxes. NOT yet proven on a REAL ticket against the REAL (large) UU repo — large-repo repo-map cost + contamination risk are unexercised. That is exactly what the AiderDevice wrapper (T-aider-rack-device-wrapper, next, HIGH-inertia) will test on actual tickets. Also: aider bytes bypass io_corpus (direct litellm->Hex); Stage-2 proxy endpoint captures them later.

## Reproduce
python3 devlab/claudecode/aider_smoke.py --task checkout --model qwen3-coder:30b
